name: Mera Pati Salman Khan
description: The play "MERA PATI SALMAN KHAN" directed by Raj Upadhyay, revolves around 2 friends, who are re-uniting after many years. Both friends, weave a tangled web, when they brag to each other about how handsome their husbands are, how wealthy they have become and are living a life of luxury. To continue this charade, they involve their husbands and family members and sink deeper into the abyss of make believe. description: The global house phenomenon touches down in India for his long-awaited debut.Mochakk brings his signature blend of high-energy beats, house, techno and funk — a groove-heavy sound that’s been shaking dance floors from Ibiza to the world’s biggest festival stages. We know him for his one-of-a-kind and groove-driven sets. His India debut isn’t about hype, It’s about pure connection to his music.Get ready for deep grooves & rolling basslines!MOCHAKK CALLING.India, are you ready to answer?

name: Music & Masala Fest | Delhi
description: The Music & Masala Fest is a high-energy cultural Music and food Festival that combines live music performances, diverse food stalls, and lifestyle shopping. It is designed as a "full-sensory takeover" featuring a mix of musical genres, focusing on desi hip-hop, pop, and indie artists and bollywood music. This year Fest is coming bigger and better than ever before. Its happening in Delhi, Bengaluru & Indore this edition. It is Music Masala's 16th Edition.

Kayaka
raw_data.category: Blending Bruce’s genre-fluid guitar and compositional sensibility with Pallavi’s evocative interpretations, Kayaka weaves Western acoustic folk, blues, world music, and jazz with Indian folk and classical traditions, creating a stirring, thought-provoking musical experience.

raw_data.title: Lakkshya
raw_data.category: Lakkshya is a contemporary Indian fusion ensemble that blends the depth of Carnatic music with modern global influences. The band brings together accomplished musicians who create a rich and dynamic sound through expressive melodies, rhythmic complexity, and improvisation. The ensemble features K. J. Diliip on violin, Ila Diliip on violin and vocals, Sunaad Anoor on percussions, Gopi Shravan on drums, Vivek Santosh on keyboard, and Bruthuva Caleb on bass.

raw_data.category: Time Throttle is a progressive rock band that was formed in 2019. After playing 40+ Tool tribute shows across India, Time Throttle is now ready to bring out their originals. Keeping alive the tradition of thinking outside the box, Time Throttle came up with the unique idea of taking their originals out on tour before heading into the studio to record the final versions, because they believe that music is incomplete without the listener.

Sage for the Ages
raw_data.category: Sage for The Ages creates immersive music for the dreamer-listener — soundscapes where jazz improvisation meets neo-soul warmth, psychedelic color, and ambient depth. Led by writer, vocalist, and guitarist Kirtana Krishna, the band balances inward reflection with social awareness, turning lived experience into atmosphere and narrative. Pianist Aman Mahajan shapes the music with surprising harmonic pathways, bassist Dhani Muniz structures each piece with a producer’s ear for tone and space, and drummer Raul Mattia grounds the ensemble in steady, intentional motion.

After Dark | Lobocop
raw_data.category: LoboCop is the DJ avatar of Kenneth Lobo – cultural producer, Indian nightlife historian and music journalist. As a DJ, he is drawn to the funkier, groovier side of things – marrying soul, funk, boogie and disco rarities for an unmistakable sound. He has a particular talent for the lost art of building up a night, whetting the crowd’s appetite, all in service to the vibe. LoboCop is a genre-agnostic selector who loves to get dancers out of their comfort zones, grooving to music you seldom hear on Indian dance floors.

A family friendly, substance free session that leaves you lighter, happier and connected. raw_data.title: Blackstratblues Live at the Warehouse #04 (Show 02)
raw_data.category: Blackstratblues is a solo project of Warren Mendonsa, who is a guitarist, composer, producer and recording engineer. The current lineup is augmented by Jai Row Kavi (Indus Creed, Pangea) on drums, Adi Mistry (Shankar Ehsaan Loy, Amit Trivedi) on bass and Beven Fonseca (Clinton Cerejo, Amit Trivedi) on keys. Their music is predominantly instrumental, consisting of a blend of blues, rock & 70's psychedelia with strong melodic and occasional electronic influences.
